# Customer-story snippet

## When to use

Use when independent trust is needed.

## Why it works

Social proof lowers uncertainty.

## Mechanism

Specific customer story beats generic testimonial.

## Required inputs

Problem, action, result, proof.

## When not to use

If story lacks details.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

CTR, case-study views, lead quality.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
